title: Launchers and Arrows
description: Add some bows, launchers, and arrows
body:
# Description Adds 3 Bows, 4 Launchers, and 16 Arrows or Ammunition.
You have many ways to engage in combat, making battles more fun.
I recommend installing a recipe mod (e.g., JEI) to check how to craft items. # Items ## Long Bow **Longer charge, stronger arrows.**
![long bow recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/881512d219a321f6c6d372472eedd987115b2488.png) ## Rapid Bow **Shoots faster, reloads faster.**
![rapid bow recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fc773f081427d9ab765a1a4861b953939c48603.png) ## Multi-shot Bow **Shoots 3 arrows at the same time.**
![multi-shot bow recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6ef85dec5d9d111e58b6dc0368e558ba0c17b2d.png) ## Mechanical Bow **Three crossbows in one.**
![mechanical bow recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c4ff5126b0c45a38f9f20ab2c0a128893630f14.png) ## Modular Bow **We take no responsibility if modifications break it.**
![multi-shot bow recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95709789d14fb6bf725bb947270bab18584b9979.png) ## Rainshot Bow **Shower your enemies with a barrage of arrows..**
![multi-shot bow recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61b254c8cb4ab7bf724a5ab1d3b474411b1a05fa.png) ## Crosslauncher **Shoots a variety of items.**
![crosslauncher recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd0ecde719b414721a4de3fe5122d12a2f80002f.png) ### Compatible Ammunition: - Arrows - Fireworks - Potions - Torch - Blaze Rod - Wind Charge - Fire Charge - Glow Ink Sac - Ink Sac - Amethyst Shard - Slime Ball - Snowball - Egg - Ender Pearl - Trident - Dragon's Breath - End Rod - Ender Eye - Magma Cream - Echo Shard - Heart of the Sea - Heavy Core - Pointed Dripstone - Lightning Rod ## Hook Launcher **Grapple and fly farther.**
Requires a "Grappling Hook" to function.
![hook launcher recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3a37d3845c0aa10955bb7bf9e0b71efff154c85.png) ## Slingshot **Build from a distance.**
Any block can be launched.
![slingshot recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e57cb1813d8a68ad1454d79c4f00bc33eba8f567.png) ## Bolt Thrower
**Knock down your enemies with a rain of bolts.**
Requires "Boxed Bolts" to fire.
![bolt thrower recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b96459a0f42ef6e52c1830c44d63874a2e3b9d8.png) ## Quick Bolt Thrower
**All or nothing.**
Requires "Boxed Bolts" to fire.
![quick bolt thrower recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/579473f2414260d244026b2cc3e14bb36fb933cd.png) ## Attributes - Flame ![flame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/949922368a9a088e80dc289b36890fea30e63dcf.png) : Burns the target. Different from standard fire damage. - Frost ![frost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/306bc19298c966b9e61fe12d7f9a5ec0bf8a3898.png) : Freezes the target. - Lightning ![lightning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b85c0fcbec8cbae54ee4444f496b6f8276e5d4db.png) : Stuns the target. - Acid ![acid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e01d8b53fc12220ab486c3ab577d11e799a9022.png) : Increases damage taken by the target and penetrates a percentage of its defenses. - Flood ![flood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a84c81353717c4b8a58eac32685d8f125abf36c2.png) : Reduces a percentage of damage from the target and drowns it. - Echo ![echo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cbc4c29bed4df37c335ab469aa2a2961a013856.png) : Redirects the entity attacked by the target. If the target is a player, it alters their viewpoint. - Injury ![injury](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2c3b5d90064724f691f207db97a5ad3a5909379.png) : Increases damage taken by the target by a fixed amount. ## Modifiers ### Modifiers Enhance Weapons Strings can be installed on Bows, and Pulleys can be installed on Bolt Throwers. ### Effects Attribute icons correspond to each attribute.
![range](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a5d32ead4184bd027e723f4ce1d72a6a4ebf931_0.webp) **Range**: Extends the weapon's range.
![sturdy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/257dadc7226bd1af22d918440884a4813c622a6f_0.webp) **Sturdy**: Decreases durability loss probability.
![lightweight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1ffe31ca1d380e19b42d1706408bdc2a110f8a7_0.webp) **Lightweight**: Reduces charge time.
![ricochet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/546306c66c6d74cb073586b8bb356c13c50436b8_0.webp) **Ricochet**: Reflects fired arrows.
![precision](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/709b6443eed5b8dab1c0c7d7c81cef1041cd7b93_0.webp) **Precision**: Reduces arrow dispersion.
![capacity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f9e36f0c1cda344205601bba833b2a3d3da97f7_0.webp) **Capacity**: Increases maximum loading capacity. (Bolt Thrower Only)
## Ammunition - Powerful effects are triggered by repeated hits. ## Villager Trades ### These Items Can Be Obtained by Trading with Fletchers Modifiers can be obtained using trade tickets.
![trades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d1ffb2b0e5ea96f31b1b815532f99fe2aa8d942.png) ## Item Tooltip Attribute effect values are added to the normal tooltip like this:
![item tooltip description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1c182ab32741432c675f89d52958a38503889db.png)
